tasks.label: Build Electron (Production)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build Android (Production)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m capacitor -T android

tasks.label: Build Electron (Fixed)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build_electron.log 2>&1 ; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host '✅ Electron BUILD OK' } else { Write-Host '❌ Errores encontrados:'; Select-String 'error' build_electron.log | Select-Object -First 5 }

tasks.label: Build Electron (Retry)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build_electron.log 2>&1 ; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host '✅ Electron BUILD OK' } else { Write-Host '❌ Errores encontrados:'; Select-String 'error' build_electron.log | Select-Object -First 10 }

tasks.label: Build Electron (Fixed 2)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build_electron.log 2>&1 ; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Electron BUILD OK' } else { Write-Host 'Errores:'; head -50 build_electron.log | tail -20 }

tasks.label: Build Electron
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build Electron
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build_electron.log 2>&1 ; Write-Host ( if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { '✅ BUILD OK' } else { '❌ FAILED - Checking log:'; Get-Content build_electron.log | Select-String 'error' | Select-Object -First 3 } )

tasks.label: Build Android
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m capacitor -T android

tasks.label: Build Electron (Diag)
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 2>&1 | tail -40

tasks.label: Build Electron
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build E
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build.log 2>&1 ; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'OK' } else { Get-Content build.log | Select-String 'error|Error|ERROR' | Select-Object -First 5 }

tasks.label: Build E2
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 > build_e.log 2>&1 ; Write-Host ( if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { 'BUILD OK' } else { 'ERRORS'; Get-Content build_e.log | Select-String 'error' | Select-Object -First 3 } )

tasks.label: Build Final
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build Electron
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build Now
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'DONE|Error|error' | Select-Object -First 20

tasks.label: Build Android
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m capacitor -T android

tasks.label: Build Electron Quick
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'DONE|Success|Error|error' | Select-Object -First 15

tasks.label: Build Electron
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32

tasks.label: Build Electron Fast
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'DONE|Success|Build' | Select-Object -Last 5

tasks.label: Build E
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m electron -T win32 2>&1 | tail -30

tasks.label: Build Android
tasks.command: npx quasar build -m capacitor -T android 2>&1 | tail -30
